sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tuno laibu sung ka min kigelh zo,
A mual theilo a mial ngeilo ding
Khut mapawn tawh kigelh zo ta.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sangpen Pa aw ka lungdam hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Neek leh dawn silh leh ten inn leh lo zong,
A nisim in zatding sum leh paai,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Diik ding huih manngenlo hongpiak man in,
A khawnkhong in hong zangsak hi.
